workflows.description: Create your own workflows in our apps using our low-code platform.

1.title: Customized workflows for optimized process control
1.description: Create and manage workflows that are precisely tailored to your requirements. Define steps, set data parameters, establish rules and outline important criteria to optimize your processes and make them more efficient

2.title: Workflow-Management
2.description: Customize workflows by seamlessly integrating them with the apps and campaigns you want to ensure they are optimally embedded in your workflows.

3.title: Access administration
3.description: Specify whether content should be used privately or shared within the company to ensure controlled interactions and data security.

hr.description: Recruit new employees and manage employee data

1.title: Recruitment
1.description: Create your own recruiting workflow and manage all important data on potential candidates across teams in the system. Define responsibilities and manage all internal communication.

2.title: Employee management
2.description: Manage each employee's personal information, including contact details, salary history and performance evaluation.

3.title: Analytics for hiring metrics
3.description: Track hiring metrics accurately with our integrated analytics tool, which provides valuable insights into recruitment performance and helps you optimize your strategies.

hr.tourDescription_organization: Recruit and manage new hires, automatize and track absence days, keep track on hiring metrics with our built-in analytics tool

documents.description: All documents with easy integration into HR and CRM

1.title: File management for higher productivity
1.description: Create, edit and format files individually according to your personal and professional needs to improve productivity and collaboration in your organization.

2.title: Efficient document sharing for better communication
2.description: Improve collaboration and communication between teams by sharing documents within your organization or with external users.

3.title: Comprehensive file access across all apps
3.description: Easily access files from all apps! This feature allows you to assign documents to specific apps to access them directly and vice versa. This ensures seamless integration and effortless access.

documents.tourDescription_personal: Create, edit and format files, share documents with external users, access files from all apps using auto structured format
documents.tourDescription_organization: Create, edit and format files, share documents within your organization or external users, access files from all apps

accounting.description: Account overview, invoicing, dunning, contract management for expenses and revenues, cash management.

guestViewOptions.invitationText: You have been invited to collaborate on this file in Clusterix Clustercells!

clusterDoc.description: Create new documents and export to other applications

1.title: Efficient document management
1.description: Design your documents according to your wishes. Start from scratch or upload existing files to customize them with our highly flexible document editor.

2.title: Working collaboratively on documents
2.description: Encourage teamwork and increase efficiency by working together on documents and granting access to all team members.

3.title: Effective document management in the cloud
3.description: Store all files securely in our cloud-based document management app for easy access anytime, anywhere.

clusterDoc.tourDescription_personal: Create and edit your files from scratch, or upload existing ones, store all documents securely in our document management app

clusterOffice.description: Create, edit, and manage all types of office documents

companySearch.description: Find the perfect suppliers, customers & partners

1.title: AI-supported lead search
1.description: Using AI and NLP, we analyze company data and extract crucial criteria to help you find the ideal customers.

2.title: Efficient data management
2.description: Connect created campaigns in the sales app with the search function to directly access sales-related data and thus optimize your workflow and internal communication.

3.title: Activity and communication management
3.description: Stay organized and informed with our integrated activity area. It brings together all the activities and communication data of each company and makes them available in one central location.

timetracking.description: A powerful time tracking system. Assign times to tasks and gain an overview of how time is spent on various activities.

1.title: Time tracking with detailed activity documentation
1.description: Track your working time individually: pause and start manually or divide into sections. Document your activities or events in detail with notes and descriptions.

2.title: Targeted time allocation to work activities
2.description: Allocate your work hours specifically to individual events, meetings, or tasks.

3.title: Performance Monitoring and Analysis Tools
3.description: Use the analysis tool to get an overview of all activities and statistical data. This helps you to evaluate productivity and increase efficiency.

timetracking.tourDescription_personal: Track your time and easily check your progress, allocate tasks, events or meeting to your timer, see your statistics

project-management.description: Create and schedule projects, costs, and staff

1.title: Manage project's plan & budget
1.description: with our advanced project planning and cost management tools all in one place.

2.title: Keep track on your projects
2.description: across the organization with our easy-to-use AI-based project stream analysis tool, which enables you to swiftly pinpoint projects that require prompt action

3.title: Sign & Download the timesheets
3.description: of all employees manully or digitally and utilize them as documentation to substantiate your project-related claims.

project-management.tourDescription_organization: Manage your project's plan and  budget, keep track on your projects across the organization, sign and download timesheets

taskManagement.description: Create and configure tasks freely. Stay organized with pinned boards and your specific tasks

1.title: Easy task management
1.description: Create your own pinboards and manage them with a simple drag-and-drop function.

2.title: Customization of Tasks
2.description: Design your tasks according to your individual needs by integrating elements such as assigning responsibilities, creating checklists, adding subtasks and much more.

3.title: Optimized project overview and transparent team communication
3.description: Maintain an overview of all relevant project information and increase the efficiency of collaboration through transparent communication within the team.

taskManagement.tourDescription_personal: Create and manage all your tasks, easily drag and drop to organize them into categories, customize tasks to your needs
taskManagement.tourDescription_organization: Create and manage all your tasks, customize tasks to your needs, keep track and stay connected with your team

sales.description: Optimize all interactions with your customers

1.title: Lead generation and communication
1.description: Find potential customers and communicate directly with them through our integrated search system and communication features.

2.title: Lead-Management
2.description: Optimize the organization and management of your leads by clearly structuring products and campaigns. Rely on a flexible follow-up process to encourage engagement and maximize sales opportunities.

3.title: Sales performance analysis
3.description: Detailed analyses allow you to track and evaluate the performance of your sales organization. This allows you to optimize your strategies, maximize your results and make informed decisions to increase the overall efficiency of your sales force.

byteBuilder.description: Start building and managing your custom application data structure

1.title: Customized data management
1.description: Import or create your database as a new schema in ByteBuilder and customize the data placement exactly to your needs

2.title: Managing data structures
2.description: Manage your existing data structures by adding, removing or editing data points at any time.

3.title: Integration of dataClick to apply
3.description: Seamlessly integrate data into your workflow as a dedicated data resource for specific users within the workflow.

templateManager.description: Easily create and use system-wide templates

1.title: Customize templates
1.description: for your unique needs, whether for contracts, emails, or any other type of document.

2.title: Connect templates with apps
2.description: to streamline your workflow and boost productivity across your organization.

3.title: Publish templates
3.description: to any individual, team, or office with ease, ensuring seamless access while prioritizing data security.

subsidies.description: Manage your grants for R&D projects and ensure uniform and clean documentation.

internalCustomers.description: Support existing customers, customer projects, and customer activities.

clusterPdf.description: Edit and convert from and to PDF

externalForms.description: Create forms to collect data from external sources

bulkMailing.description: Send one-time and recurring emails such as newsletters, internal emails, or reminders

1.title: Effortless Campaign Creation
1.description: Design professional, visually appealing email campaigns using customizable templates from the Template Manager.

2.title: Targeted Audience Management
2.description: Create personalized campaigns by building targeted audiences and importing contacts from HR, Customer, or Contacts apps. Streamlined tools make the process easy for everyone, regardless of technical expertise.

3.title: Optimized Scheduling
3.description: Schedule send dates in advance to deliver your emails at the most effective times for audience engagement.

integration.description: Sync time tracking, people and tasks and create projects & workplans based on your Structure.

homepage.description_personal:
Manage every aspect of your personal tasks
efficiently from a single integrated platform
homepage.description_organization:
Manage every aspect of your business
efficiently from a single integrated platform
homepage.take_tour_again_reminder: You can always take the tour again inside user menu

interconnected_apps.title: Interconnected apps
interconnected_apps.description: Get the full picture on all of our apps. All connected, all here to streamline your process

all_apps.title: Meet All Of Our Apps
all_apps.description: Get the full picture on all of our apps. All connected, all here to streamline your process

shortcuts.title: Your Productivity Toolkit in Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Easy access Live Chat, Contacts, Email, Time Tracking, Calendar and Notification tools on the top bar

live_chat.description: Connect with team members instantly for quick discussion and updates

contacts.description: Add and save your contacts and companies to easy access

email.description: Send and receive emails directly within the platform for seamless communication

time_tracking.description: Monitor working hours, analyze productivity, connect with Task Management

calendar.description: Schedule and manage meetings and events, send invitations to team members

notifications.description: Get critical and instant notifications from all apps to stay connected to the team

apps_page.title: What app are you most interested in?

other_tools_page.title: Do you use other tools?
other_tools_page.description: Please let us know if you use any additional apps or tools to support your workflows or processes.
other_tools_page.placeholder: Enter the names of the tools or apps you use.
